zh.Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Talbot於大約1285年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal37歲，母親Sarah de Beauchamp37歲。他於大約1316年與Joan Mortimer在英國英格蘭賀福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1328年10月10日之前在英國賀福爾喬姆斯利，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾喬姆斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Talbot于大约1285年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal37岁，母亲Sarah de Beauchamp37岁。他于大约1316年与Joan Mortimer在英国英格兰賀福爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1328年10月10日之前在英国賀福爾喬姆斯利，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾喬姆斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Talbot was born about 1285, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal, was 37 and his mother, Sarah de Beauchamp, was 37. He married Joan Mortimer about 1316, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died before 10 October 1328, in Wormsley, Herefordshire, England, and was buried in Wormsley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Talbot est né environ 1285, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Beauchamp, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Joan Mortimer environ 1316, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé avant 10 octobre 1328, à Wormsley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Wormsley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Joan Mortimer circa 1316, nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì prima del 10 ottobre 1328, nel Wormsley, Herefordshire, England, e fu sepolto a Wormsley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Talbotが約1285年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswalは37歳，母Sarah de Beauchampは37歳であった。約1316年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでJoan Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1328年10月10日以前にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウオルムスリーで死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウオルムスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Talbot(이)가 대략 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah de Beauchamp(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1316년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 Joan Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1328년 10월 10일 이전 영국 허퍼드실르 워슬리에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 워슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Talbot nasceu aproximadamente 1285, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Sarah de Beauchamp, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Mortimer aproximadamente 1316, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 10 de outubro de 1328, em Wormsley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Wormsley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Talbot родился около 1285 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Beauchamp, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Mortimer около 1316 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер перед 10 октябрь 1328 г. в местности вормсли, хирефордшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности вормсли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
